primary_function: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using modern frontend web technologies (React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui). Use for complex artifacts requiring state management, routing, or shadcn/ui components - not for simple single-file HTML/JSX artifacts.
suggested_aec_gates: Verify output avoids excessive centered layouts, purple gradients, uniform rounded corners, and Inter font
Confirm output follows the 5-step process: initialize, develop, bundle, display, optional test
Validate project structure includes React 18 + TypeScript + Vite + Parcel + Tailwind CSS + shadcn/ui
Ensure bundle.html output is self-contained with inlined JavaScript and CSS
Verify initialization script creates fully configured project with all dependencies
Confirm path aliases (@/) are properly configured
Validate bundling process creates single HTML artifact suitable for Claude conversations
Ensure shadcn/ui components and Radix UI dependencies are included
Verify Node 18+ compatibility with proper Vite version pinning
trigger_text: Suite of tools for creating elaborate, multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts using modern frontend web technologies (React, Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui). Use for complex artifacts requiring state management, routing, or shadcn/ui components - not for simple single-file HTML/JSX artifacts.
